# Starry Reflections of God's Faithfulness
## Scripture
The scripture for today is Isaiah 40:26 - "Lift up your eyes and look to the heavens: Who created all these? He who brings out the starry host one by one and calls forth each of them by name. Because of his great power and mighty strength, not one of them is missing."

## Reflection
As we gaze up at the night sky, we're reminded of God's incredible power and faithfulness. The stars, like diamonds against the velvet blackness, shine brightly, each one a testament to God's creative genius. Just as God calls each star by name, He knows each of us intimately, and His faithfulness is unwavering. In a world filled with uncertainty, we can trust in God's unchanging character, just as the stars remain constant in the sky.

## Prayer
Dear Heavenly Father, as we marvel at the starry host, we're reminded of Your incredible power and faithfulness. Help us to trust in Your unchanging character, even when the world around us seems uncertain. May we, like the stars, shine brightly for You, reflecting Your light and love to a world in need. Thank You for calling us by name and for being our constant guide. We praise You for Your faithfulness and love, now and forever. Amen.
